failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS profile_id,
  p.username,
  p.num_followers
FROM profile p
JOIN profile_relationship pr ON p.id = pr.destination_profile_id
JOIN profile follower ON pr.origin_profile_id = follower.id
WHERE 
  -- Assuming influencers are defined by high follower counts
  follower.num_followers > 10000 
  -- Assuming restaurants are accounts with "restaurant" or "food" in their bio
  AND p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'restaurant | food | dining')
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY p.num_followers DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error:
connection failed: connection to server at "::1", port 5433 failed: could not receive data from server: Connection refused
Multiple connection attempts failed. All failures were:
- host: 'localhost', port: '5433', hostaddr: '127.0.0.1': connection failed: connection to server at "127.0.0.1", port 5433 failed: Connection refused
